flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Seton Hall University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.9k → $53.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Seton Hall University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.9k → $53.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Seton Hall University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Seton Hall University are 22% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($70.2k vs $57.4k).
